/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INVOFF:BRITT ELMORE/WIT SWORN:OFFICER CLAYTON GOODWIN;OFFICER BRITT ELMORE;   /EXHM:1=2 LARGE CLEAR SEALED BAGS STAPLED TOGETHER, 1 CONTAINING AN  EVIDENCE ENVELOPE AND THE 2ND CONTAINING 2 WHITE FORMS;  1A= EVIDENCE   ENVELOPE FROM EXHIBIT 1; 1B=SMALL BAGGIE CONTAINING WHITE ROCKS; 1C=  SMALL BAGGIE CONTAINING GRAY PILLS; 1D=CLEAR BAGGIE CONTAINING WHITE  POWDER & WHITE PILLS; 1E=CLEAR BAGGIE CONTAINING 2 SMALL WHITEPILLS;  1F=CLEAR BAGGIE CONTAINING A SMALLER BAGGIE CONTAINING BLUE POWDER&  BLUE PILLS;/HTA1:1, 2, & 3/CTORD:COUNTS 3,IS HELD TO ANSWER AS 11350(A)HS-F/871D:6, 7, 8, 9, 10 & 11/X:PER DA PAUL BRENNAN, DISMISSED COUNTS 6,7,8 & 9 ARE DISMISSAL CODES OF 68 & AND COUNTS 10 & 11 ARE DISMISSED /X:THE COURT REDUCES COUNTS 4 & 5, BOTH TO COUNTS OF  11375(B)(2)HS-MISD/
